visual_description: A man in a dark striped sweater holds a large, crumpled parchment while a woman in a dark jacket stands beside him, both examining the paper in a dim stone corridor; light from a diamond‑pane window casts blueish beams across the scene as they turn to face each other.
audio_description: Low indistinct conversation occurs between the two characters, accompanied by the soft rustling of the parchment. No other sounds are audible.
